name: codemap-boost-codex
description: Codex-native CodeMap workflow powered by code-review-graph and optional graphify.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/run-hook.cjs && node --check scripts/setup.cjs && node --check scripts/check-plugin.cjs && node --check scripts/run-tests.cjs && node --check hooks/js/session_start.js && node --check hooks/js/post_tool_use.js && node --check hooks/js/pre_bash.js && node --check hooks/js/user_prompt_submit.js && node --check hooks/js/subagent_start.js && node --check hooks/js/lib/bootstrap.js && node --check hooks/js/lib/codemap.js && node --check hooks/js/lib/runtime.js
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run check && npm run test:unit
